name: jira-sprint-workflow
description: End-to-end Jira sprint workflow for Claude Code teams. Four skills: (1) jira-setup — guided first-time setup that walks users through API token generation, auto-discovers account ID and projects, and validates live against Jira; (2) jira-story-design — brainstorms a feature, embeds the spec in Jira, generates an implementation plan, and creates 11 self-contained subtasks; (3) jira-story-execute — autonomously walks the chain to Done, pausing only at the human manual-test checkpoint, with full resumability from Jira state; (4) jira-architect-review — right-sized production-readiness review (3 / 5 / 7 / 10 angles based on the diff) at subtask 8 or any time a change needs shipping-risk assessment. The design/execute/review skills all gate on config and hand off to jira-setup automatically if any value is missing.

jira_url.title: Jira Cloud URL
jira_url.description: Your Jira Cloud base URL, e.g. https://myteam.atlassian.net

jira_username.title: Jira Username / Email
jira_username.description: Your Jira account email (used with the API token for Basic auth)

jira_api_token.title: Jira API Token
jira_api_token.description: Your Jira API token — generate at https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens

project_key.title: Jira Project Key
project_key.description: The Jira project key where Stories and Subtasks will be created (e.g. WFR, ENG, TECH)

default_owner_account_id.title: Default Owner Account ID
default_owner_account_id.description: Default assignee for parent Tasks and Subtask 7 (Manual Testing). Use Jira account ID, not email. Find yours at https://<your-jira>.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/myself

components.title: Jira Components (comma-separated)
components.description: Comma-separated list of your Jira Components / product areas (e.g. 'Backend,Frontend,Infrastructure'). Create these via Jira Project Settings → Components if they don't exist.

plans_directory.title: Plans Directory
plans_directory.description: Repo path (relative to your working copy) where implementation plans and test plans are stored. Default: docs/superpowers/plans

specs_directory.title: Specs Directory
specs_directory.description: Repo path where design specs are stored. Default: docs/superpowers/specs
